title: SkillInvocation
description: Per-invocation telemetry event emitted by every published skill. Required by the Spine (skills/TEMPLATE) and validated by the Tier 0a linter.

invocation_id.description: Server-assigned UUID for the invocation. Optional in the schema; present in the actual emission.

skill.description: Skill name (kebab-case), must match folder name.

skill_version.description: Semantic version of the skill at invocation time.

use_case_id.description: UC-NN identifier from the use-case file frontmatter.

industry.description: One of the registered industry keys (kebab-case).

classification.description: Skill-specific primary output (e.g., MODERATE, ATO_WITH_CONDITIONS, DEFICIENCY_MW).

redaction_applied.description: If true, raw inputs were stripped of PII/NPI/PHI before persistence. If false, the event MUST NOT contain raw input payloads.
